/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libAsmValidator.so -o libAsmValidator.so CMakeFiles/AsmValidator.dir/plugin/AsmValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsmValidator.dir/plugin/AsmTokenizer.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangAST.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangFrontend.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangDriver.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangParse.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangSerialization.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangSema.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangAPINotes.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangEdit.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangAnalysis.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangAST.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangLex.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangBasic.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libclangSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVM.so.1
